## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — version bumps, dependencies, config

## Checklist
- [ ] `claude-lore doctor` passes clean
- [ ] `pnpm run build:cli` succeeds
- [ ] If this is a release, ALL version strings updated:
  - [ ] `./scripts/version-check.sh <version>` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Tag created on main AFTER merge (not before)
